mapper.sql: pejt.group_id, pejt.employee_id as pe_id, pejt.old_job_id as fjo_id, pejt.old_job_name as fjo_job_name, pejt.old_dept_id as fdo_id, pejt.old_dept_name as fdo_dept_name, pejt.new_job_id as fjn_id, pejt.new_job_name as fjn_job_name, pejt.new_dept_id as fdn_id, pejt.new_dept_name fdn_dept_name, pejt.start_time, pejt.end_time, pejt.transfer_reason, pejt.transfer_state, pejt.remarks, pejt.attribute1, pejt.attribute2, pejt.attribute3, pejt.attribute4, pejt.attribute5, pejt.enabled_flag, pejt.id, pejt.create_time, pejt.create_by, pejt.update_time, pejt.update_by, pejt.transfer_type, pejt.transfer_error, pejt.old_ext_dept_name as fdo_ext_dept_name, pejt.old_ext_department_name as fdo_ext_department_name, pejt.old_ext_team_name as fdo_ext_team_name, pejt.new_ext_dept_name as fdn_ext_dept_name, pejt.new_ext_department_name as fdn_ext_department_name, pejt.new_ext_team_name as fdn_ext_team_name, pejt.transfer_form, (select description from fnd_user fu_update where fu_update.id = pejt.update_by) update_by_user

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.old_job_id as ${tAlias}_fjo_id, ${tAlias}.old_job_name as ${tAlias}_fjo_job_name, ${tAlias}.old_dept_id as ${tAlias}_fdo_id, ${tAlias}.old_dept_name as ${tAlias}_fdo_dept_name, ${tAlias}.new_job_id as ${tAlias}_fjn_id, ${tAlias}.new_job_name as ${tAlias}_fjn_job_name, ${tAlias}.new_dept_id as ${tAlias}_fdn_id, ${tAlias}.new_dept_name as ${tAlias}_fdn_dept_name, ${tAlias}.start_time as ${tAlias}_start_time, ${tAlias}.end_time as ${tAlias}_end_time, ${tAlias}.transfer_reason as ${tAlias}_transfer_reason, ${tAlias}.transfer_state as ${tAlias}_transfer_state, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.transfer_type as ${tAlias}_transfer_type, ${tAlias}.transfer_error as ${tAlias}_transfer_error, ${tAlias}.old_ext_dept_name as ${tAlias}_fdo_ext_dept_name, ${tAlias}.old_ext_department_name as ${tAlias}_fdo_ext_department_name, ${tAlias}.old_ext_team_name as ${tAlias}_fdo_ext_team__name, ${tAlias}.old_ext_dept_name as ${tAlias}_fdn_ext_dept_name, ${tAlias}.old_ext_department_name as ${tAlias}_fdn_ext_department_name, ${tAlias}.old_ext_team_name as ${tAlias}_fdn_ext_team__name, ${tAlias}.appointment_and_removal_type as ${tAlias}_transfer_form

select
,
from pm_employee_job_transfer pejt join pm_employee pe on pejt.employee_id = pe.id
mapper.select: select count(*) from pm_employee_job_transfer pejt join pm_employee pe on pejt.employee_id = pe.id where 1 = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_job_transfer (group_id, employee_id, old_job_id, old_job_name, old_dept_id, old_dept_name, new_job_id, new_job_name, new_dept_id, new_dept_name, start_time, end_time, transfer_reason, transfer_state, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, transfer_type, transfer_error, old_ext_dept_name, old_ext_department_name, old_ext_team_name, new_ext_dept_name, new_ext_department_name, new_ext_team_name, transfer_form) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{oldJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{oldJob.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldDept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{oldDept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{newJob.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newDept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{newDept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transferReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transferState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{transferType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transferError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldDept.extDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldDept.extDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldDept.extTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newDept.extDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newDept.extDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{newDept.extTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transferForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_job_transfer set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, old_job_id = #{oldJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, old_job_name = #{oldJob.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, old_dept_id = #{oldDept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, old_dept_name = #{oldDept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_job_id = #{newJob.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, new_job_name = #{newJob.jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_dept_id = #{newDept.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, new_dept_name = #{newDept.deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, start_time = #{startTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{endTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, transfer_reason = #{transferReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transfer_state = #{transferState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, transfer_type = #{transferType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transfer_error = #{transferError,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, old_ext_dept_name = #{oldDept.extDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, old_ext_department_name = #{oldDept.extDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, old_ext_team_name = #{oldDept.extTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_ext_dept_name = #{newDept.extDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_ext_department_name = #{newDept.extDepartmentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, new_ext_team_name = #{newDept.extTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transfer_form = #{transferForm,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select pejt.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.old_job_name) > 0 then pejt.old_job_name else null end as fjo_job_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.new_job_name) > 0 then pejt.new_job_name else null end as fjn_job_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.transfer_reason) > 0 then pejt.transfer_reason else null end as transfer_reason, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.remarks) > 0 then pejt.remarks else null end as remarks, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.transfer_type) > 0 then pejt.transfer_type else null end as transfer_type, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.old_ext_dept_name) > 0 then pejt.old_ext_dept_name else null end as fdo_ext_dept_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.old_ext_department_name) > 0 then pejt.old_ext_department_name else null end as fdo_ext_department_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.old_ext_team_name) > 0 then pejt.old_ext_team_name else null end as fdo_ext_team_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.new_ext_dept_name) > 0 then pejt.new_ext_dept_name else null end as fdn_ext_dept_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.new_ext_department_name) > 0 then pejt.new_ext_department_name else null end as fdn_ext_department_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.new_ext_team_name) > 0 then pejt.new_ext_team_name else null end as fdn_ext_team_name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pejt.transfer_form) > 0 then pejt.transfer_form else null end as transfer_form from pm_employee_job_transfer pejt join pm_employee pe on pejt.employee_id = pe.id where pejt.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pejt.transfer_type <> '初始入职岗位' and concat( pejt.old_job_name, pejt.new_job_name, pejt.transfer_reason, pejt.remarks, pejt.transfer_type, pejt.old_ext_dept_name, pejt.old_ext_department_name, pejt.old_ext_team_name, pejt.new_ext_dept_name, pejt.new_ext_department_name, pejt.new_ext_team_name, pejt.transfer_form ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
